failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of TBAB/EG exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Ensure feed reservoir is pressurized to maintain inlet pressure above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Accumulation of particulates or reaction byproducts
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement regular maintenance and monitoring of BPR valve

failure_modes.mode: Inadequate mixing leading to poor reaction yield
failure_modes.cause: Flow regime not achieving laminar mixing as required
failure_modes.mitigation: Optimize flow rates and reactor design to ensure proper mixing

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Monitor pump performance at various temperatures to assess cavitation risk
Conduct a blockage test by introducing particulates into the flow and monitoring BPR function
Evaluate mixing efficiency by analyzing reaction yield at different flow rates
